Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.dialog

Interface ITextComponent<T>

Type Parameters:
T - The type of the value to be returned by this component.
All Known Implementing Classes:
Checkbox, DoubleField, IntegerField, LongField, NumberFieldBase, SelectableTextField, TextArea, TextAreaTabs, TextField
public interface ITextComponent<T>
The interface to be implemented by all text components in a dialog.
